data.content: Shipment completed. Merged `chore/foolery-1940-update-logging` into main as commit `23064d564854` and pushed to `origin/main`. Remote workflow results for this push: `CI` succeeded in 1m39s and `Coverage Badge` succeeded in 40s. GitHub emitted warning annotations about coverage regression and Node 20 action deprecation, but both workflows concluded successfully. Local merged-main validation in the shipment worktree also passed: `bun run test`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, and `bun run build` succeeded; lint remained clean apart from the existing `src/components/beat-form.tsx` React Compiler warning.
